---
title: "BESIII Coupled-Channel Analysis"
subtitle: "Selected fit results and diagnostic plots"
---

::: {.callout-warning}
These pages contain preliminary research material and are not an official
BESIII collaboration result.
:::

## Current study

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-7}
### Method 2 GPU fit: J/ψ → ωπ⁺π⁻ and J/ψ → ωK⁺K⁻

The latest study records 20 requested fit starts, optimizer outcomes, resource
growth, dominant fit fractions, one-dimensional projections and Dalitz-plot
diagnostics.

[Open the latest result](experiments/formal-cutevents-method2-gpu-fix/index.qmd)
· [View the earlier baseline](experiments/formal-cutevents-example/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-5}
![](experiments/formal-cutevents-method2-gpu-fix/assets/generated/optimizer_nll.png){fig-alt="Optimizer outcomes for the latest fit"}
:::
:::

## Scope

This public site contains selected plots and concise conclusions. Reproducible
internal records, full logs, configurations, parameter snapshots and input data
are maintained separately.
